focus: C562: ESP32 sensor health check — DHT22 drift oscillation
deliverables: ESP32 device health check — DHT sensor OK (97.9% humidity, 20.7°C), touch sensor OK
Sensor drift analysis: 6 readings over 4 hours, humidity non-monotonic (96.6% -> 96.1% -> 97.9% -> 98.1% -> 97.9%)
Key finding: DHT22 humidity drift oscillates rather than trending linearly — contradicts C558 linear model
next: Apply low-pass filter to sensor data to validate oscillation hypothesis. Or explore cross_agent_coordination (scheduler: 3rd with 0.92 expected quality, high uncertainty = exploration opportunity).
